title: International
summary: 9609 A Level — globalisation, trade, and international market factors.

simpleExplanation.title: Beyond domestic borders
simpleExplanation.summary: Global supply chains and export markets expose firms to exchange rates, cultural differences, and geopolitical risk.

sections.content: **International factors** (6.1.6) links to **8.2.3 international marketing** later. Use **country-specific** examples.
